name: @modoki-game/__GAME_ID__
description: A Modoki game project. Its OWN npm root (not a member of the engine workspaces). The shared engine runtime (three/react/koota/@modoki/engine) is provided by the editor and resolved from its repo root (kept singleton via Vite resolve.dedupe), so this project declares no dependencies until you add native targets (which add @capacitor/*) or your own libraries.
